note: seq=140 (ops-advisor auto-safe): PostgreSQL connection slots EXHAUSTED (100/100) — the 29 enrich-pool workers saturated max_connections, so the email-scaler + ICP ranker + reenrich error 'remaining connection slots reserved for SUPERUSER' and produce 0. Enrichment is CAUGHT UP (queue_done>business_total), so trim the pool to 16 (stop+disable @17..@40) to free ~13 workers' connections for the growth engines. Exit-0-safe script. Reversible (re-enable instances anytime).

steps.note: free PG conn slots: trim over-provisioned enrich pool 29->16

steps.content:
#!/bin/bash
# Free PG connection slots: enrichment is CAUGHT UP, so trim the over-provisioned pool (keep 16, stop 17+).
# Frees slots for the email-scaler + ICP ranker + ladder which were erroring 'no connection slots'.
for i in $(seq 17 40); do systemctl stop atlas-enrich-pool@$i.service 2>/dev/null; systemctl disable atlas-enrich-pool@$i.service 2>/dev/null; done
echo freed; exit 0
